messages.content: sure, i am asking 275.0 for it.

i'll come pick it up for 90.0!
i am asking 100.0 for the Panasonic 32" TV set.
i will pay 100.0 with the warranty, free shipping and insurance on the item.
i am great how are you?
okay we are asking 2400.0 it is Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating and the price includes the cleaning services.
would you consider leasing one for 2160.0?
at this time the lowest we can accept for this would be 2350.0.
good thanks! i'd love to but this place. what can you tell me about it?
would yo be willing to accept 647.0?
i'm afraid that won't work. 1200.0 is a final offer. sorry.
i think we are not a good match for this $1295 Studio Apt in Richmond -walk-in distance to Bart. sorry. good luck
i'm interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn.
hi yes it is! 300.0 for it. lightly used, great quality.
i think that's too high a price. i can get it elsewhere for 210.0
i am a little short of money right now ... how about 223.0?
not really, i could probably come up to 246.0?
yes it is. im asking 1633.0 for it.
how about we make a deal for 816.0,
are you still interested? i can do 1580.0
can you lock it in at 1170.0?
1310.0 and paint the door red too. final offer.
sure. i am selling it for 1900.0
how about we make a deal for 1330.0,
how about i meet you half-way? 1850.0?
how about 1850.0 and all of us can be happy?
can you lock it in at 1590.0?
1800.0 and you've got yourself a deal
make it 1700.0 and i'll shake your hand right now
it is too high for me, i was thinking more around 115.0
161.0 and i will bring it to you right now
i understand. 158.0 and we have a deal.
yes i do! i'm listing it for 125.0, gently used. bought it for 125.0
122.0 was my offer, take it or leave it
if you can pay 116.0, i will throw all of that in. deal?
ok fine then we are in agreement 116.0
yes, hello, are these two pieces of furniture in good condition?
would you be willing to take 300.0 for it?
that's a bit low for the worth of the Rosewood Dining Table, 8 chairs, Corner Cabinet. i could do 600.0.
how about 518.0 and i will deliver it to you myself?
hi im very interested in your Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug (Pinks).
hi! im very interested in your Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug (Pinks). why are you selling them? anything wrong with them?
